Container.Name: librechat
Container.Overview: Self-contained LibreChat for Unraid. Bundles LibreChat, MongoDB, and MeiliSearch into a single container supervised by s6-overlay. All persistent state lives under one mount at /mnt/user/appdata/librechat. Secrets are auto-generated on first start and can be overridden via the Advanced fields below. See the project README for details on providing a custom librechat.yaml and updating the image.
Container.Requires: A running Unraid server with an appdata share. On first start the container auto-generates CREDS_KEY, CREDS_IV, JWT_SECRET, JWT_REFRESH_SECRET, and MEILI_MASTER_KEY into /mnt/user/appdata/librechat/.env. Provide your own values in the Advanced fields if you want to reuse a specific Meili index or rotate secrets without regeneration.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port the LibreChat UI listens on.

Config.Name: Config / Data
Config.Description: Persistent state. Holds mongo/, meili/, uploads/, images/, logs/, the .env file, and an optional librechat.yaml.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: IANA timezone, e.g. Europe/Paris. List at https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones.

Config.Name: Allow Registration
Config.Description: When true, anyone who can reach the UI can create an account. Start with 'true' on first boot so you can register yourself, then flip back to 'false' to lock the instance. Do NOT leave 'true' on a publicly reachable deployment.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID that owns files under /config. Unraid default is 99 (nobody).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID that owns files under /config. Unraid default is 100 (users).

Config.Name: Meili Master Key
Config.Description: Leave blank to auto-generate on first boot. Provide a value only if you want to reuse an existing Meili index.

Config.Name: CREDS_KEY
Config.Description: 32-byte hex. Leave blank to auto-generate. openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: CREDS_IV
Config.Description: 16-byte hex. Leave blank to auto-generate. openssl rand -hex 16

Config.Name: JWT_SECRET
Config.Description: 32-byte hex. Leave blank to auto-generate. openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: JWT_REFRESH_SECRET
Config.Description: 32-byte hex. Leave blank to auto-generate. openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Mongo WiredTiger cache (GB)
Config.Description: WiredTiger internal cache size for MongoDB, in gigabytes.

Config.Name: Meili max indexing memory
Config.Description: Upper bound on RAM Meili uses during indexing.

Config.Name: Node max-old-space-size (MB)
Config.Description: LibreChat API Node.js heap cap in megabytes.
